title: Ancient architecture meets nature as rare red-wattled Lapwing spotted hatching at Bhojshala complex
description: The bird, known for its striking black-and-white neck pattern, brown wings and distinctive red beak, was spotted standing calmly near a shallow stone bowl within the heritage complex.

description: Thucydides is considered the ‘guiding light’ of political realism, the philosophy that states operate out of self-interest and the pursuit of power, not morals or ethics
